prompt: Create a calm healing vertical photo-style image of a young woman with her face softly blurred for privacy resting on a turquoise outdoor sports court in warm late-afternoon sunlight. She is seated and leaning back on one hand, head tilted upward as if peacefully dozing, legs stretched diagonally toward the lower left. Dress her in loose blue denim overalls over a white long-sleeve shirt, white sneakers, and a small white backpack beside her. The background should show a red running track and soft green field out of focus, with tree-shadow patterns across the court. Add a whimsical chalk-doodle overlay aesthetic directly on the ground, as if drawn with pastel sidewalk chalk: exactly 11 fish doodles total, including 1 large yellow fish at left, 1 pink fish at lower left, 1 small blue fish at left, 1 white fish near center-left, 1 blue fish above the subject, 1 yellow fish at right, 1 tiny blue fish inside a white swirl near the subject's hand, 1 small yellow fish near center-bottom, 1 pink fish at lower right, 1 white fish at lower right, and 1 small pale gray fish near the white fish. Include exactly 5 star doodles: a yellow outlined star upper left, a yellow star at upper right, a yellow star near center, a small yellow star near lower center, and a pink outlined star near lower left. Surround them with flowing chalk lines like underwater currents in white, pale blue, pink, and yellow, plus scattered bubbles, tiny dots, and pink “z z z” sleep marks floating near the subject’s head. Use soft pastel chalk graffiti, hand-drawn, childlike, dreamy, gentle color grading, shallow depth of field, realistic photography blended with playful illustration, peaceful graduation-season campus mood, no extra people, no text other than the small “z z z” marks, no watermark.
